subcodes.first_line: O My Pen! Thou art the Pen of God, the All-Possessing, the Self-Subsisting - this is the Book inscribed and the Tablet traced by Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب مسطور من ای قلم من قلم الله المهیمن القیوم و لوح مرقوم من ای یراعه من
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
